description: Rogue Frontier Patch 1 (12 February 2025) — Item Destruction changes, Territory Raiding energy increase, Combat Balance Changes (Axes, Bows, Frost Staffs, Shapeshifter Staffs, War Gloves, Helmets), Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes
items: Items can no longer be destroyed if a player is ejected from the Roads of Avalon
Many consumable items that began generating trash upon destruction with the Rogue Frontier update have been reverted — those items no longer generate trash
Clarification: Equipable items had destruction rate increased from 30% to 33%; Non-equipable items had destruction rate decreased from 36% to 33% (rates unchanged in this patch)
Energy destruction from Territory Raiding increased from 10% to 20%
sections.searchable_text: Changes Item Destruction Roads of Avalon ejected consumables trash Equipable 30% 33% Non-equipable 36% Territory Raiding energy 10% 20%

subsections.heading: Bows

changes.raw_text: Sky's Fury: Dash range: 7m → 10m; Buff duration: 3.5s → 3.75s; Damage per bolt: 130 → 140; Bolt hit delay: 0.6s → 0.4s

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Frost Staffs Avalanche Hoarfrost Staff Snowball damage 60 120 Knockback 5m 10m slow trail width 4m 5m

changes.raw_text: Avalanche: Snowball damage: 60 → 120; Snowball Knockback distance: 5m → 10m (knockback duration unchanged); Increased slow trail width: 4m → 5m

changes.raw_text: Shadow Panther Transform: Transformation movement speed: 6.5 → 5.5

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Circle of Inspiration Druid Cowl Max targets 5 10

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Evasive Jump (Royal Shoes): Fixed issue where immunities could incorrectly be purged
Infernal Boulder (Hellfire Hands): Fixed issue where a line of sight was required
Sky Bolt (Skystrider Bow): Fixed issue where a line of sight was required
Fixed issue where islands would sometimes not be selectable in the Travel Planner UI
Fixed issue where linking Kill Trophies in chat would not display correctly
Fixed issue where it was not possible to reach Elite Levels on the Destiny Board using the Learn button
[Mobile] Fixed issue where chat channel buttons would not work
[Mobile] Fixed issue where long-pressing in various UIs would fail to bring up tooltips
Fixed issue where Small Treasure Chests had gone missing from red zones
